title: Tata Memorial Centre is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Memorial Centre is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Memorial Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Memorial Centre:
Tata Memorial Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
